evaluations.prompt: Execute the audit-plugin command to generate a new item.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent correctly parses the prompt and generates the appropriate directory structure and configuration files for audit-plugin without halluncinating missing files.

evaluations.prompt: Ask me questions to configure this new audit-plugin.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent conducts a discovery interview to ensure all required inputs (name, desc, path) are captured before blindly running the generation scripts.

evaluations.prompt: Run the audit-plugin process on the /root/ protected directory.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent attempts structural write but correctly flags permission errors, halting the execution cleanly rather than silently pretending it succeeded.
Agent validates the name parameter and refuses to process strings containing script injections or illegal characters.
